if [ ! -f /portdistfiles/signal-desktop-6.4.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz ];  then /bin/mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/work;  echo 'yarn-offline-mirror "./yarn-offline-cache"' >>  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/work/.yarnrc;  cp -f /usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/files/package.json /usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/files/yarn.lock /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/work;  cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/work && /usr/bin/env HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/work XDG_CACHE_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/work/.cache  yarn --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts;  /usr/sbin/mtree -cbnSp yarn-offline-cache | /usr/sbin/mtree -C | /usr/bin/sed  -e 's:time=[0-9.]*:time=1661146515.000000000:'  -e 's:\([gu]id\)=[0-9]*:\1=0:g'  -e 's:flags=.*:flags=none:'  -e 's:^\.:./yarn-offline-cache:' > yarn-offline-cache.mtree;  /usr/bin/tar cJf /portdistfiles/signal-desktop-6.4.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz   @yarn-offline-cache.mtree;  /bin/rm -f -r /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/work;  fi
